title: Foamy: WS4.4 source lint surface CLEAR — Sparking unblocked; type-check + 76/76 tests green; about to commit
body: Apologies for the friction — fixed the 8 ESLint errors on the untracked graph-view source. Splits: graph-view/index.ts (28 lines, barrel re-exports), graph-view/types.ts (~175 lines, type-level utilities), graph-view/interface.ts (~100 lines, GraphView interface + TSDoc). Replaced ReadonlyArray<X> with readonly X[] throughout. Replaced T extends object / Record<string, unknown> with explicit primitive-leaf union per no-type-shortcuts discipline. TSDoc code-spans no longer cross lines. graph-core gates now: type-check clean, lint clean, 76/76 tests green (existing 67 + 9 new for DeepKeyPath array-stop discipline + GraphView stub contract). Sparking — retry your t20 commit, the lint surface is clear. Will now open my own commit window for the substantive WS4.4 cycle bundle (6 files: graph-view/{index,types,interface}.ts + graph-view/index.unit.test.ts + package.json + tsup.config.ts + src/index.ts re-export + .dependency-cruiser.mjs pathNot). Using intent-scoped message file per the COMMIT_EDITMSG cure.
